calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses Of Defendant Spinnaker Insurance Company
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses Of Defendant Spinnaker Insurance Company
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Peter Roldan, Esq. 415-894-9284 Emergent LLP for Plaintiff.
Min Kang, Esq. 213-680-2800 Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

1 - PLAINTIFF MINNA MILLARE's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses Of Defendant Spinnaker Insurance Company.

Plaintiff Minna Millare's motion to compel further discovery responses to her document requests 32 and 33 by defendant Spinnaker Insurance Company is denied. The declaration of Yvette Borrego establishes that compliance by Spinnaker with requests 32 and 33 would be unduly burdensome. Ms. Millare's faulting of Spinnaker for failing "to offer any way of narrowing the" requests lacks merit. Ms. Millare, not Spinnaker, has sought the entirety of the files of approximately 3,509 claims, none of which she has provided any reasonable basis to believe will provide probative information. Under these circumstances, if Ms. Millare believes narrowed requests are feasible and not unduly burdensome, she should initiate the discussion among counsel about how her requests could be narrowed.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
